label: Vertical slice — enthusiast
summary: Organize by feature slices under src/features. Shared and lib are the only escape hatches; sibling features must not import each other.

layerDescriptions.Features: One folder per feature/use-case — API, UI, hooks, types together. No imports from sibling features.
layerDescriptions.Shared: Reusable primitives (UI kit, utils, types) with zero feature knowledge.
layerDescriptions.Lib: Infrastructure clients (db, HTTP, env) shared across features.
layerDescriptions.App: App shell, routing, and composition root.
